chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-72 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on M.A No.3549/2021 3. For hearing of main case 25.11.2025 Mr.Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G ****** None have appeared in this Criminal Revision Application since its institution till the present except for one date of hearing on 31.10.2025, thereafter, this matter was listed by consent of applicant for 11.11.2025 at 9:00 a.m., but none appeared. Today, once again none have appeared on behalf of the applicant inspite of notices dispatched to applicant counsel by electronic mode. No intimation is received. It appears that applicant has lost interest. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
